Game.Name: Hoshi no Kirby 3 (Japan)
Game.plot: Kirby's Dream Land 3 is an Action game, developed by HAL Labs and published by Nintendo,which was released in 1997.Cheat: Access ? Option on the Options MenuYou get this option from beating all the other mini-game options. Here, you can see the opening introductions to each world, as well as each of the 3 endings to the game.Cheat: Access ? Option on the Options MenuTo access the ''B'' option, which pits you against all six bosses with one life and no chance to heal, you must beat the final boss.Cheat: Access ? Option on the Options MenuTo access the ''J'' option, which is the Jumping mini-game on the Options Menu, you must complete the mini-game in the ''M'' option.
